characteristics: Governed by space and air elements.
Associated with movement, flow, communication, and change.
Qualities are light, cold, dry, rough, mobile, and subtle.
When balanced: creative, enthusiastic, energetic, and adaptable.
When imbalanced: anxious, fearful, dry skin, constipation, and insomnia.
balancing_routines: Wake up early and maintain a consistent daily schedule to ground the mobile energy.
Massage the body with warm sesame oil (Abhyanga) before bathing to reduce dryness and coldness.
Eat warm, cooked, moist, and grounding meals (such as soups and stews) with healthy fats like ghee.
Practice alternate nostril breathing (Nadi Shodhana Pranayama) to calm the nervous system.

characteristics: Governed by fire and water elements.
Associated with transformation, digestion, metabolism, and energy production.
Qualities are hot, sharp, light, liquid, oily, and spreading.
When balanced: intelligent, focused, organized, and courageous.
When imbalanced: irritable, angry, prone to inflammation, acid reflux, and skin rashes.
balancing_routines: Incorporate cooling foods into the diet (sweet fruits, leafy greens, cucumber, coconut water).
Perform a gentle massage using cooling oils (like coconut or sunflower oil) to soothe excess heat.
Avoid intense exercise during the hottest parts of the day; prefer calming walks in nature.
Practice sheetali pranayama (cooling breath technique) to release heat and reduce anger.

characteristics: Governed by earth and water elements.
Associated with structure, stability, lubrication, and cohesion.
Qualities are heavy, cold, moist, slow, steady, soft, and static.
When balanced: calm, loving, compassionate, loyal, and physically strong.
When imbalanced: lethargic, prone to weight gain, congestion, attachment, and depression.
balancing_routines: Wake up before sunrise (by 6:00 AM) to prevent accumulation of heavy, sluggish energy.
Engage in vigorous daily exercise (like sun salutations or brisk walking) to stimulate circulation and heat.
Eat warm, light, dry, and spicy foods to balance coldness and moisture; minimize dairy and sweet foods.
Perform dry skin brushing (Garshana) to stimulate lymphatic flow and reduce congestion.
